summary: Signed up a fresh account, confirmed the first-visit empty states on Axis Library and Transcripts, created a draft pack to verify transcript extraction stayed unavailable without attachments, and cleared pack context to confirm axis-generation gating.

assertions.reason: A fresh organization showed helpful empty states on Axis Library and Transcripts, the draft pack without attachments showed the no-transcripts state, and clearing pack context disabled axis generation on the pack detail surface.

frictions: Data created in one browser session was most reliable when the same persistent browser profile was reused for later validation steps.
